name: Create Branches of Government Flipchart
description: Create a 3-page interactive flipchart lesson on the Three Branches of the US Government. The first page should be titled "Three Branches of Government" and introduce the Legislative, Executive, and Judicial branches. The second page must include distinct sections for each branch using the terms "Congress", "Senate", "House of Representatives", "President", and "Supreme Court". The third page should be titled "Checks and Balances" and feature a visual diagram using shapes and lines/arrows to illustrate at least two examples of checks, such as "veto", "impeach", "override", "appoint", or "judicial review". Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/branches_of_government.flipchart.
